name: Santorini (Thera)
eruptionHistory: The Minoan eruption ~1600 BCE was one of the largest in the last 10,000 years, possibly destroying the Minoan civilization. Nea Kameni has erupted several times in the last 2,000 years.
description: Santorini's caldera was formed by the massive Minoan eruption around 1600 BCE. The eruption may have inspired the legend of Atlantis and contributed to the decline of the Minoan civilization.
